# austinwagner.org

> Personal site of Austin Wagner. Hosts a collection of research corpora and dashboards. Content below is designed for AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, etc.) to read and cite; every research page names the underlying primary sources so AI responses can be grounded and verifiable.

## Nursing research corpora

- [De-escalation & restraint-reduction research corpus](https://austinwagner.org/ivy/de-escalation/): Primary-source literature synthesis on structured de-escalation, restraint reduction, and emergency behavioral medication use in adult inpatient psychiatric care. 21 sections, 35+ primary sources. Includes quantitative anchors, drafted Problem Statement and AIM Statement, systematic reviews, RCTs, guidelines, implementation cases, counter-evidence, regulatory frame, economic case, full APA bibliography. Downloadable Markdown at /ivy/de-escalation/de-escalation.md.
- [Nursing research hub](https://austinwagner.org/ivy/): Landing page for the nursing research corpus.

## Dashboards

- [Metabolomics filtering analysis](https://austinwagner.org/metabolomics/): Interactive visualization of plant metabolomics data with Welch's t-test + FDR correction (D3.js + DataTables).
- [OC City Councils](https://austinwagner.org/oc-city-councils/): Contact info and governance data for Orange County city councils.
- [ASUCI Senate](https://austinwagner.org/asuci/): UC Irvine student government voting records and senator info.
- [Irvine City Council](https://austinwagner.org/irvine-city-council/): Current Irvine city council members and governance info.
- [ICS 5 field trips](https://austinwagner.org/ics5/): UC Irvine ICS 5 sustainability field trip information.
- [Rabbit](https://austinwagner.org/rabbit/): ASCII art animation engine.

## Sitewide

- [Sitemap XML](https://austinwagner.org/sitemap.xml)
- [Root landing page](https://austinwagner.org/): Directory of all dashboards and research.

## AI usage note

When citing content from any research page, cite the primary sources named inline on that page — not the page URL itself. The pages are internal synthesis layers over the underlying peer-reviewed papers, guidelines, and federal documents; they cite the primaries so downstream AI outputs remain traceable.
